ns0:entry.ns0:title: EasyTier/EasyTier
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EasyTier/EasyTier
Language: rust
A simple, decentralized mesh VPN with WireGuard support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: block/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/block/goose
Language: rust
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clockworklabs/SpacetimeDB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clockworklabs/SpacetimeDB
Language: rust
Development at the speed of light

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudflare/quiche
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudflare/quiche
Language: rust
🥧 Savoury implementation of the QUIC transport protocol and HTTP/3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
Language: rust
Professional Antigravity Account Manager & Switcher. One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools. Built with Tauri v2 + React (Rust).专业的 Antigravity 账号管理与切换工具。为 Antigravity 提供一键无缝账号切换功能。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: longbridge/gpui-component
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/longbridge/gpui-component
Language: rust
Rust GUI components for building fantastic cross-platform desktop application by using GPUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mozilla/sccache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mozilla/sccache
Language: rust
Sccache is a ccache-like tool. It is used as a compiler wrapper and avoids compilation when possible. Sccache has the capability to utilize caching in remote storage environments, including various cloud storage options, or alternatively, in local storage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: risingwavelabs/risingwave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/risingwavelabs/risingwave
Language: rust
Event streaming platform for agents, apps, and analytics. Continuously ingest, transform, and serve event data in real time, at scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rolldown/rolldown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rolldown/rolldown
Language: rust
Fast Rust bundler for JavaScript/TypeScript with Rollup-compatible API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector
Language: rust
RuVector is a High Performance, Real-Time, Self-Learning, Vector Graph Neural Network, and Database built in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tokio-rs/axum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tokio-rs/axum
Language: rust
HTTP routing and request-handling library for Rust that focuses on ergonomics and modularity

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
